title: 咘咘和爸爸妈妈一起做咖啡

pages.text: 咘咘和爸爸妈妈一起做咖啡
pages.text_en: Bubu Makes Coffee with Daddy and Mommy

pages.text: 早上，厨房里飘来好香好香的味道。咘咘揉揉眼睛，跟着香味走过去。
pages.text_en: In the morning, a yummy smell floated out of the kitchen. Bubu rubbed her eyes and followed the smell.

pages.text: 是爸爸在做咖啡！爸爸把咖啡豆倒进磨豆机，咕噜咕噜响。
pages.text_en: Daddy was making coffee! He poured coffee beans into the grinder — grr, grr, grr!

pages.text: 咘咘好奇地跑过去："爸爸，这是什么呀？好香！"
pages.text_en: Bubu ran over curiously. "Daddy, what's that? It smells so good!"

pages.text: 爸爸笑着说："这是咖啡豆哦。来，闻闻看！"咘咘凑近闻了闻："好～香～"
pages.text_en: Daddy smiled. "These are coffee beans! Here, take a sniff!" Bubu leaned in and smelled. "Sooo yummy!"

pages.text: 妈妈把水壶放在炉子上。水开了，咕嘟咕嘟冒泡泡！
pages.text_en: Mommy put the kettle on the stove. The water boiled — bubble, bubble, bubble!

pages.text:
咘咘伸出小手想摸水壶："我也要——"
妈妈温柔地拉住她："等一等！热水很烫很烫，小手碰到会好疼哦。"
pages.text_en: Bubu reached out to touch the kettle. "I want to —" Mommy gently held her hand. "Wait! The hot water is very, very hot. Your little hand would get an owie!"

pages.text: 爸爸蹲下来说："咘咘，我们站远一点看好不好？远远看，不用手碰！"
pages.text_en: Daddy knelt down. "Bubu, let's watch from far away, okay? We can look from here — no touching!"

pages.text: 咘咘乖乖退后几步。爸爸把热水慢慢倒在咖啡粉上。哇，咖啡粉鼓起来了，像小山丘！
pages.text_en: Bubu stepped back like a good girl. Daddy slowly poured hot water over the coffee grounds. Wow, the coffee puffed up like a little hill!

pages.text: "好香啊！"咘咘站在远处，使劲吸吸鼻子，闻到了咖啡的香味。
pages.text_en: "Smells so good!" Bubu stood back and took a big sniff, smelling the coffee aroma.

pages.text: 爸爸冲好了咖啡，倒给妈妈一杯。妈妈喝了一口："好好喝！"
pages.text_en: Daddy finished the coffee and poured a cup for Mommy. Mommy took a sip. "Delicious!"

pages.text:
妈妈说："咘咘乖乖站远远的，没有碰热水，真棒！"
咘咘开心地说："热水烫烫，远远看！我记住啦！"

爸爸妈妈一起笑了。☕🌸
pages.text_en:
Mommy said, "Bubu was so good, standing far away and not touching the hot water! Great job!"
Bubu said happily, "Hot water is ouchie — watch from far away! I'll remember!"

Daddy and Mommy laughed together. ☕🌸

title_en: Bubu Makes Coffee with Daddy and Mommy
